title: TreebankSentence
description: One dependency-parsed sentence, cleaned from Perseus treebank data (AGLDT XML or UD Perseus CoNLL-U) into the {nodes, edges} shape consumed by the native SVG renderer. Runtime-only fields (layout x/y, isHighlighted) are intentionally NOT part of this schema. See TREEBANK-DATA-FIELDS.md and TREEBANK-SCHEMA.md.

id.description: Sentence ID within the document. Source: AGLDT <sentence @id> / CoNLL-U '# sent_id ='.

index.description: 1-based ordinal of this sentence in the document, for the pager ('1 of 756'). Derived during cleaning.

total.description: Total sentence count in the document, for the pager. Derived during cleaning.

docId.description: Document / text identifier. Source: AGLDT <sentence @document_id> / a CTS URN.

cite.description: Passage citation shown in the footer = the source @subdoc, e.g. '6.1'. The human-readable work name (e.g. 'Aeneid') is derived from docId at render time, not stored here. Source: AGLDT <sentence @subdoc> / CoNLL-U '# citation'.

text.description: Full plaintext of the sentence for the bottom text-strip. Source: CoNLL-U '# text =', or concatenated node forms.

provider.description: Data provenance shown in the footer, e.g. 'Perseus treebank'.

version.description: Dataset version shown in the footer, e.g. '2.1'.

nodes.description: All words/tokens in the sentence, one node each.

edges.description: Dependency arcs. Counting the synthesized virtual root (node id 0), a well-formed tree of N nodes has exactly N-1 edges. This count invariant is NOT enforced by JSON Schema; check it in a custom validator.

allOf.$comment: pos is required for every real token, but optional for the synthesized virtual root and for artificial/elliptical nodes that have no surface morphology.

id.description: Word ID, unique within the sentence. Used as the lookup key for edge.from / edge.to (do NOT assume id == array index). Id 0 is reserved for the synthesized virtual root. Real tokens: word/@id or CoNLL-U column 1 (>= 1).

form.description: Surface token shown as the node's large text, e.g. 'fatur'. May carry a leading hyphen for split enclitics ('-que'). The virtual root uses the marker '[0]'. Source: word/@form or CoNLL-U column 2.

lemma.description: Dictionary headword (optional; for hover / secondary display). Source: word/@lemma or CoNLL-U column 3.

pos.description: Readable part of speech, e.g. 'NOUN' / 'VERB'. Recommended vocabulary is UD UPOS (NOUN VERB ADJ ADV PRON DET ADP AUX CCONJ SCONJ NUM PART INTJ PROPN PUNCT SYM X). Not enum-constrained because AGLDT decodes to a different short tagset. Source: decoded postag[0] / CoNLL-U UPOS column 4.

morph.description: Short morphology summary shown as the node's small text, e.g. 'ACC.PL' or '1SG'. Pick only salient features; empty for invariant words. Source: decoded postag[1..8] / CoNLL-U FEATS column 6.

label.description: Pre-composed small-text line (= pos + ' · ' + morph), e.g. 'NOUN · ACC.PL'. Optional convenience; the renderer can also compose it from pos + morph.

isRoot.description: True ONLY for the synthesized virtual root (node id 0). Every source token whose head == 0 becomes a child of node 0 (there may be several: the main predicate or top coordinator, plus terminal punctuation). Exactly one node per sentence must have isRoot true (invariant NOT enforced by JSON Schema).

artificial.description: True for nodes with no real surface form: the synthesized virtual root (id 0) and AGLDT elliptical nodes (forms like '[0]', '[1]'). When true, 'pos' is not required. Defaults to false when absent.

from.description: Parent (head) node id. 0 means the child attaches to the virtual root (source head == 0). Must reference an existing node.id (referential integrity NOT enforced by JSON Schema). Source: word/@head.

to.description: Child node id (= this word's own id). Always a real token (>= 1); the virtual root is never a child. Must reference an existing node.id. Source: word/@id.

relation.description: Dependency relation label drawn on the arc, e.g. 'OBJ' / 'ATR' / 'SBJ'. AGLDT tagset (PRED SBJ OBJ ATR ADV ... possibly with _CO / _AP suffixes, plus Aux*) differs from UD deprel; kept as a free string. Source: word/@relation / CoNLL-U DEPREL column 8.
